description: You are the Import Controller. A shipment has just been received from 'Shenzhen Global Components Ltd' containing electronics components. The warehouse team has already processed the receipt, but we need to allocate the additional import costs to the inventory valuation. Using the cost allocation memo at /home/ga/Desktop/import_shipment_costs.txt, create and validate a Landed Cost record in Odoo (admin@example.com / admin) for the corresponding Goods Receipt. Apply the three cost lines (Ocean Freight, Customs Duty, Cargo Insurance) using the 'By Current Cost' split method for all lines.
